productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women White Shirt
description: Style NoteIntroduce this stunning shirt from united colors of benetton to your formal collection. The three quarter length sleeves add a refined touch to your formal ensemble. This shirt looks great with a pair of denims or trousers.Product DetailsWhite shirt, has three quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs, stand-up collar with buttoned front placket and a curved hemMaterial and Care98% cotton and 2% spandexMachine wash cool with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryDry clean delicateSize and Fit   Regular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
